title: cytisus ardoinoi var. sauzeanus
intro: Cytisus ardoinoi var. sauzeanus, commonly known as French broom, is a shrub-like legume native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. Cytisus ardoinoi var. sauzeanus has been used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its anthraquinone content, which acts as a laxative. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions and extracts, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
